creator: heritageericsson@gmail.com
text:
There is no longer a requirement to stage ports using the needs-staging keyword, new ports should instead follow the guidelines provided in the stagedir. 

The reason I didn't get rid of it sooner is because I know there are more keywords that need to be changed, deleted, or added, and the functionality (auto-assigner) may rely on or use/add keywords in certain instances and may not robustly handle their absence.
https://phrazle.co
